text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 109 

RFRG_PHYSN_NPI 

LABEL: Carrier/DME Referring Physician NPI Number 

DESCRIPTION: The national provider identifier (NPI) number of the physician who referred the beneficiary or the 
physician who ordered the Part B services or durable medical equipment (DME). 

SHORT NAME: RFRG_PHYSN_NPI 

LONG NAME: RFRG_PHYSN_NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage
